overall.description: A cinematic nighttime drive through a rain-soaked urban intersection in GTA V. The camera moves smoothly from the sidewalk, across wet asphalt streets, and continues down a multi-lane road past commercial buildings and parking lots, with streetlights reflecting off the glistening pavement.

events.description: moving from sidewalk curb onto the wet asphalt street

agents.ego_description: approaching the intersection from the sidewalk, moving onto the street surface

entered.detail: large concrete utility pole on the sidewalk edge
multi-story turquoise residential building with illuminated windows
overhead traffic signal showing red lights
white commercial trucks parked along the left curb
tall street lights illuminating the wet road

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a rainy urban street corner, positioned near a utility pole and red curb. The camera moves forward onto the wet asphalt, approaching a multi-lane intersection with a prominent turquoise apartment building on the right and parked trucks visible on the left.

events.description: dark sedan crosses the intersection from right to left in front of the camera

agents.ego_description: proceeding through the intersection, navigating around crossing traffic

notable_agents.action: dark-colored sedan driving through the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: tall residential buildings visible beyond the intersection
low-rise commercial structures on the left horizon

segments.scene_description: The camera moves through the wide intersection as a dark sedan crosses from right to left. The turquoise apartment building recedes into the background on the right, while distant commercial buildings and apartment complexes come into view ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban arterial road with commercial parking

agents.ego_description: continuing down the multi-lane road past the intersection, passing commercial areas on both sides

entered.detail: large fenced parking lot with multiple parked vehicles
single-story commercial buildings with illuminated signage
palm trees silhouetted against the night sky

segments.scene_description: Moving past the intersection, the scene transitions to a commercial arterial road. A large parking lot occupies the right side while strip mall buildings line the left. Palm trees become visible in the distance as the camera continues down the rain-slicked road under streetlights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rainy urban street corner that gradually opens into a wide commercial arterial road. It begins near a utility pole and red curb, gliding forward onto wet asphalt toward a multi-lane intersection anchored by a prominent turquoise apartment building. As the camera moves through the intersection, a dark sedan crosses the path and the turquoise building recedes, revealing a vista of distant commercial complexes ahead. The scene then shifts onto a rain-slicked arterial road, passing a large parking lot on the right and strip mall buildings on the left. Finally, the camera continues its forward trajectory under the glow of streetlights as palm trees emerge in the distance.
